content.json:
## Windows Server Details
Detailed inventory of all Arc-enabled Windows Servers including OS version, ESU status, hardware, and connectivity.

parameters.name: WinServerStatus
parameters.label: Server Status
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend ServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| distinct ServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend ServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ServerStatus in ({WinServerStatus})
| extend coreCount = toint(properties.detectedProperties.coreCount)
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| summarize TotalCores = sum(coreCount) by osSku
| order by TotalCores desc
content.title: Cores by Windows OS

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend ServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ServerStatus in ({WinServerStatus})
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend osVersion = tostring(properties.osVersion)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by osSku, osVersion
| order by osSku asc
content.title: OS Version by Windows OS SKU

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend ServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ServerStatus in ({WinServerStatus})
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend shortOsSku = replace_string(osSku, 'Windows Server', '')
| summarize ServerCount = count() by shortOsSku, osVersion = tostring(properties.osVersion)
| summarize osVersionCount = count() by shortOsSku
| order by shortOsSku asc
content.title: Distinct OS Versions per SKU

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend ServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ServerStatus in ({WinServerStatus})
| extend Cores = toint(properties.detectedProperties.logicalCoreCount)
| extend TotalPhysicalMemory = toint(properties.detectedProperties.totalPhysicalMemoryInGigabytes)
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend osVersion = tostring(properties.osVersion)
| extend ESU = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| extend esuEligibility = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.esuEligibility)
| extend agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| extend Manufacturer = tostring(properties.detectedProperties.manufacturer)
| extend Model = tostring(properties.detectedProperties.model)
| extend Domain = tostring(properties.domainName)
| extend FQDN = tostring(properties.machineFqdn)
| extend LicenseType = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.licenseType)
| extend SoftwareAssurance = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.softwareAssuranceCustomer)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project Name = name, subscriptionName, resourceGroup, osSku, osVersion, ServerStatus, Cores, ['Memory (GB)'] = TotalPhysicalMemory, ESU, esuEligibility, agentVersion, Manufacturer, Model, Domain, FQDN, LicenseType, SoftwareAssurance, location
| order by Name asc
content.title: Windows Server Inventory
